options.name: --input
options.description: The path to the project (.csproj) to generate the client. (Required)

options.name: --output
options.description: The generated file path (single file) or the directory path to generate the files (multiple files). (Required)

options.name: --no-use-unity-attr
options.description: Do not use UnityEngine's RuntimeInitializeOnLoadMethodAttribute on MagicOnionInitializer. (Same as --disable-auto-register) (Optional)

options.name: --disable-auto-register
options.description: Do not automatically call MagicOnionInitializer during start-up. (Automatic registration requires .NET 5+ or Unity) (Optional)

options.name: --namespace
options.description: The namespace of clients to generate. (Default: MagicOnion)

options.name: --messagepack-formatter-namespace
options.description: The namespace of pre-generated MessagePackFormatters. (Default: MessagePack.Formatters)

options.name: --conditional-symbol
options.description: The conditional compiler symbols used during code analysis. The value is split by ','. (Default: null)

options.name: --serializer
options.description: The serializer used for message serialization (Default: MessagePack)
